message:
🌱 Add harbor: Proxy cache does not provide images when target registry down mission (#766)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "harbor-14822-proxy-cache-does-not-provide-images-when-target-registry-is-not-wor",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: Proxy cache does not provide images when target registry is not working",
+    "description": "Proxy cache does not provide images when target registry is not working. This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n harbor --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review harbor configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant harbor configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl get configmap -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=harbor\n```\nThe Proxy cache is one of the most important features of harbor to ensure that the clients will get the most recent available images without having to connect to the upstream registry."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade Harbor for improved proxy cache fallback",
+        "description": "Upgrade Harbor to a version with improved proxy cache fallback behavior:\n```bash\n# Update the Harbor Helm repo\nhelm repo update harbor\n\n# Upgrade Harbor\nhelm upgrade harbor harbor/harbor -n harbor -f values.yaml\n\n# Verify pods restart successfully\nkubectl rollout status deployment/harbor-core -n harbor\n```\nAfter upgrading, the proxy cache will serve cached images even when the upstream registry is temporarily unavailable."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Proxy cache does not provide images when target\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n harbor --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n harbor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "When the upstream registry goes down, Harbor's proxy cache does not serve locally cached images because the health check interval (5 minutes) may not have detected the outage yet. If a pull request arrives before the registry status is marked unhealthy, the proxy cache attempts to reach the upstream and fails instead of falling back to cached images. The fix improves fallback behavior to serve cached images when the upstream is unreachable, regardless of the health check status.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "harbor",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "harbor"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/14822",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/pull/14949"
+    },
+    "reactions": 15,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with harbor installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:20:26.025Z",
